## Talks

- [6th CEN 2026](https://cen2026.org)  
*Identifying Post-COVID Risk Factors with Model-Agnostic Feature Importance* — [Slides](https://slides.lukasburk.de/2026/05-cen/slides.pdf)
- [DAGStat 2025](https://dagstat2025.de/)  
*Random Planted Forest: A Directly Interpretable Tree Ensemble* — [Slides](https://slides.lukasburk.de/2025/03-dagstat/rpf.pdf)
- [Statistical Computing 2024](https://sysbio.uni-ulm.de/ocs/index.php/statcomp/statcomp2024)  
*A Large-Scale Neutral Comparison Study of Survival Models on Low-Dimensional Data* — [Slides](https://slides.lukasburk.de/2024/07-statcomp/survbench.pdf)
- [70th Biometric Colloqium 2024](https://www.biometrische-gesellschaft.de/termine/biometrische-kolloquien/70th-biometric-colloquium-2024-in-luebeck.html)  
*A Large-Scale Neutral Comparison Study of Survival Models on Low-Dimensional Data* — [Slides](https://slides.lukasburk.de/2024/02-biocoll/01MAR24_Lukas_Burk.pdf)
- [5th CEN 2023](https://cen2023.github.io/home/)  
*High-Dimensional Variable Selection for Competing Risks with Cooperative Penalized Regression* — [Slides](https://slides.lukasburk.de/2023/09-cooper/07SEP23_Lukas_Burk.pdf)


## Workshops

- **Data Train: Introduction to Machine Learning** — [U Bremen 2021, 2023, 2025](https://www.bremen-research.de/data-train/)  
  With Marvin N. Wright. Recurring two-day introductory ML course in the Data Train program. [Materials](https://bips-hb.github.io/datatrain_workshop_ml/)

- **Introduction to R** — [RKI CARe Jan 2025](https://github.com/bips-hb/course_introduction_to_r)  
  With Luca Bergen. Multi-day R fundamentals course for public health researchers. [Materials](https://bips-hb.github.io/course_introduction_to_r/README.html)

- **Introduction to Machine Learning for Survival Analysis with `{mlr3}`** — [useR! Jul 2024](https://user2024.r-project.org/)  
  With John Zobolas. Half-day tutorial covering `{mlr3}` and `{mlr3proba}` fundamentals. [Materials](https://survival-org.github.io/user2024-survival-mlr3/)
